name: RSpec
description: Behaviour-driven-development testing framework for Ruby, the most widely used alternative to Minitest with describe/it/expect syntax.

seo.title: RSpec — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: RSpec: Behaviour-driven-development testing framework for Ruby, the most widely used alternative to Minitest with describe/it/expect syntax.

when_to_use: BDD-style unit and integration tests for Ruby apps
Shared examples for reusable spec behaviors
Describe/it/expect syntax for readable Rails test suites

pros: Rich matcher library and community gems
cons: Slower than Minitest on large suites
DSL adds indirection over plain Ruby
Minitest is Rails' own default now
review.verdict: The readability winner for Ruby tests, but Minitest is faster and ships with Rails by default.
review.best_for: Ruby and Rails teams prioritizing readable specs over raw speed
review.not_for: Performance-sensitive Ruby codebases where Minitest is faster
